sourcePrompt: A punji-stake trap, a VC booby trap - a shallow pit about a meter and a half across. The bottom bristles with a bed of sharpened bamboo stakes angled upward, while a flimsy cover of sticks, leaves and grass lies half-collapsed into the opening, broken at the center. Pale sharpened bamboo against dark disturbed earth, cruel and hidden. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
